originalTitle: Zaheer Character Reveal Trailer (Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game)
content: The revolution begins. 🌪 Use devastating airbending mixups to take your opponent's breath away... With the help of a few rebellious allies, of course. 🌊🔥💥 Watch Zaheer's character reveal trailer here. Steam Pre-Order: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2424420/Avatar_Legends_The_Fighting_Game/ PS5 Pre-Order: https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10018989/ Xbox Series X|S Pre-Order: https://xbox.com/en-us/games/store/avatar-legends-the-fighting-game/9ph2332vrwsf

chineseContent: 革命开始了。 🌪 使用毁灭性的气宗组合让对手喘不过气来……当然，在一些叛逆盟友的帮助下。 🌊🔥💥 观看扎西尔角色的预告片。 Steam 预订：https://store.steampowered.com/app/2424420/Avatar_Legends_The_Fighting_Game/ PS5 预订：https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10018989/ Xbox Series X|S 预订： https://xbox.com/en-us/games/store/avatar-legends-the-fighting-game/9ph2332vrwsf
